data.title: Pepper & Carrot: Potion of Flight
data.description: Pepper tries her first flying potion in this award-winning fantasy webcomic by David Revoy.

data.title: Pepper & Carrot: Rainbow Potions
data.description: Carrot helps Pepper brew colorful potions that do not go as planned.

data.title: Pepper & Carrot: The Secret Ingredients
data.description: Pepper hunts rare ingredients for a difficult spell with her cat familiar Carrot.

data.title: Pepper & Carrot: Stroke of Genius
data.description: A sudden burst of inspiration leads Pepper into magical mischief.

data.title: Pepper & Carrot: Special Holiday Episode
data.description: A festive short episode from the free Pepper & Carrot series.
